stemHtml: A standard trim sheet is provided including the values of ZFM index, ZFM, TOF (Take-Off Fuel), and fuel correction indexes. What is the appropriate procedure to determine the CG in MAC% of the TOM (Take-Off Mass)?

options.a: Calculate the TOM, apply the fuel correction to the ZFM index, and determine the CG from the trim sheet.
options.b: Use the ZFM and TOF to find the TOM, then use the ZFM index to find the CG directly.
options.c: Determine the TOM, add the fuel correction index to the ZFM, and read the CG from the trim sheet.
options.d: Calculate the TOM, subtract the fuel correction index from the ZFM index, and determine the CG from the trim sheet.
